meaning: n.解释程序,解释者,口译人员,翻译员,讲解员,注释器
examples: They volunteered me for the job of interpreter.
Speaking through an interpreter , the President said that the talks were going well.
Speaking through an interpreter, Aristide said that Haitians had hoped coups were behind them.
He said he had asked for an interpreter at the hearing, scheduled for 14:00 BST.
His interpreter waved the man away, and Garner returned by motorcade to Kuwait City.
